title: JSON path compiler accepts invalid input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, data JSON NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, json_extract(data, '$.name') AS name FROM json_test WHERE CAST(json_extract(data, '$.value') AS INTEGER) > 100;
UPDATE json_test SET data = json_set(data, '$.new_key', 'new_value') WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON path compiler accepts invalid JSON input
